hero.title: Manage AI Agent Skills
hero.subtitle: Like a Pro
hero.description: SkillOps is a lightweight, high-performance Go CLI utility designed to manage AI agent skills using a symlink-first approach. Pull skills from repositories and enable them across multiple Agentic IDEs without file duplication.

features.title: Why Choose SkillOps?
features.subtitle: Built for developers who value efficiency and simplicity

symlink.title: Symlink Management
symlink.description: Skills are stored centrally and symlinked to project folders. No file duplication, just smart linking.

multiIde.title: Multi-IDE Support
multiIde.description: Manage skills across Claude, Windsurf, OpenCode, and other Agentic IDEs from a single interface.

interactive.title: Rich TUI Experience
interactive.description: Premium interactive terminal interface with colored output and intuitive navigation.

safety.title: Safety First
safety.description: Protected against accidental deletions with smart path validation and confirmation prompts.

flexible.title: Flexible Configuration
flexible.description: Consolidated configuration in ~/.skillops/config/agentics.yaml for easy management.

performance.title: High Performance
performance.description: Built with Go for lightning-fast operations and minimal resource usage.

demo.title: See SkillOps in Action
demo.subtitle: Experience the power of centralized skill management

installation.title: Quick Installation
installation.subtitle: Get up and running in seconds

cta.title: Ready to Streamline Your Workflow?
cta.subtitle: Join developers who are already using SkillOps to manage their AI agent skills efficiently.

footer.description: SkillOps - Simplifying AI agent skill management for developers worldwide.
footer.madeWith: Made with ❤️ for the developer community
